title: MDC Benefits from Solid Housing Demand, Industry Woes Persist
text: MDC benefits from a solid housing market backdrop and the build-to-order process. Yet, supply chain issues, material shortages and municipal delays are a concern.

title: Home builder stocks suffer unanimous selloff after disappointing new home sales data
text: The home builder sector was suffering a unanimous selloff in morning trading Tuesday, after data showing new home sales surprisingly fell in April, and sharply, amid high prices, rising mortgage rates and low supply. The iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF ITB, -3.76% sank 3.4%, with all 47 equity components losing ground, while the SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF XHB, -3.67% dove 3.4% with all 35 components falling, to underperform the S&P 500's SPX, -2.09% 2.1% slide.

title: Lennar Isn't A Value Trap
text: LEN is down 30%+ this year like many stocks, but at 5 times earnings, the valuation is now very attractive. Homebuilder stock prices are being crushed by the spike in mortgage rates during the short term but this will present opportunities for longer term investors.

title: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock? Lennar (LEN) Could Be a Great Choice
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Lennar (LEN) have what it takes?

title: 3 Undervalued Housing Stocks to Buy Now
text: 3 undervalued housing stocks to buy now as their prices have fallen to levels that could soon support a strong rebound off these lows. The post 3 Undervalued Housing Stocks to Buy Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 7 Stocks to Sell Ahead of the Fed's Next Rate Hike
text: The upcoming Fed meeting on an interest rate hike can negatively impact the stock market. Thus, I have found seven vulnerable stocks to sell.
